items.title: Mission Control Pilot routes into the organization Pilot tab
items.precondition: Admin is signed in and Mission Control has an organization card with at least one admin user.
steps: 1. Open Mission Control.
2. Open an organization's Pilot menu.
3. Select a user.
items.expected: The same tab navigates to /admin/organizations/:id?section=pilot&userId=:userId. No popup opens and the URL contains no pilot token.
items.evidence: Chrome UI: Mission Control > One Endodontics > Pilot menu > dr.alhassany routed same tab to localhost:3000/admin/organizations/39?section=pilot&userId=60; no popup opened; live embedded frame shown. Screenshot: plans/06272026-embedded-organization-pilot-tab/evidence/mission-control-pilot-route-live.png.
items.notes: Verified in the signed-in Chrome admin session on localhost:3000/admin.

items.title: Organization Users pilot action routes into the contained Pilot tab
items.precondition: Admin is signed in and viewing /admin/organizations/:id?section=users.
steps: 1. Click the Pilot action on an organization user card.
2. Confirm the Pilot tab opens for that same organization.
3. Confirm the selected user is preselected.
items.expected: The route changes to /admin/organizations/:id?section=pilot&userId=:userId and the Pilot tab starts the contained session flow.
items.evidence: Chrome UI: Organization Users & Roles > kuda > Pilot as this user routed same tab to localhost:3000/admin/organizations/39?section=pilot&userId=56 with kuda preselected and the contained iframe live. Screenshot: plans/06272026-embedded-organization-pilot-tab/evidence/users-roles-pilot-route-live.png.
items.notes: Verified in the signed-in Chrome admin session on localhost:3000/admin.

items.title: Embedded pilot token stays out of URL and browser storage
steps: 1. Run the Playwright smoke check against /pilot-embed.
2. Send a same-origin pilot-token message to the iframe.
3. Inspect parent localStorage and sessionStorage.
items.expected: The iframe URL remains /pilot-embed and token values are null in localStorage and sessionStorage.
items.evidence: Playwright smoke: frameUrl=http://127.0.0.1:5174/pilot-embed; localToken=null; localAuthToken=null; sessionToken=null; sessionPilotMode=null.
items.notes: The smoke used a fake token, so backend 401/403 responses were expected.

items.title: Memory-only pilot session helper is covered by unit tests
steps: 1. Run npx vitest run src/utils/embeddedPilotSession.test.ts from frontend/.
items.expected: The helper exposes token and role to app code without writing token to localStorage or sessionStorage.

items.title: Pilot iframe logout or expiry does not clear parent admin auth
items.precondition: Admin is signed in, a real contained pilot session is running, and parent auth is active.
steps: 1. Start a contained pilot session from the organization Pilot tab.
2. Trigger logout or let the pilot iframe report session expiry.
3. Confirm the iframe closes or resets.
4. Refresh the parent admin tab.
items.expected: The parent admin session remains signed in and admin localStorage/cookie auth is not cleared by iframe logout or expiry.
items.evidence: Chrome UI: clicked Log out inside the embedded pilot iframe, parent admin shell stayed signed in as Dave, then refreshing localhost:3000/admin/organizations/39?section=pilot&userId=60 returned to the admin organization Pilot tab instead of login. Screenshot: plans/06272026-embedded-organization-pilot-tab/evidence/iframe-logout-parent-admin-survives-refresh.png.
items.notes: The userId URL auto-started a fresh pilot session after refresh; this confirms parent admin auth survived iframe logout.

items.title: Pilot frame stays mounted across organization tab switches
items.precondition: Admin is signed in and a real contained pilot session is running in the organization Pilot tab.
steps: 1. Start a contained pilot session from the organization Pilot tab.
2. Switch to another organization tab such as Subscription or Users & Roles.
3. Return to the Pilot tab.
items.expected: The same pilot iframe remains live after tab switching. It only resets after page refresh, explicit restart, logout, or session expiry.
items.evidence: Chrome UI: started a contained kuda session, switched to Subscription, returned to Pilot, and the selected user plus LIVE embedded iframe remained visible. Screenshot: plans/06272026-embedded-organization-pilot-tab/evidence/pilot-tab-switch-return-live.png.
items.notes: Verified using One Endodontics on localhost:3000/admin.

items.title: Embedded pilot frame has no duplicate outer scrollbar
items.precondition: Admin is signed in and a contained pilot session is visible.
steps: 1. Open the organization Pilot tab with an active contained session.
2. Inspect the frame container.
3. Scroll the client app inside the iframe.
items.expected: Only the client app iframe scroll remains. The frame container does not add a second vertical scrollbar or a horizontal scrollbar.
items.evidence: Visual Chrome check: embedded pilot frame displayed one contained client iframe scroll region without a second parent-frame scrollbar or horizontal scrollbar. Screenshot: plans/06272026-embedded-organization-pilot-tab/evidence/pilot-live-one-endo-kuda.png.
items.notes: Verified at Chrome zoom 90% in the signed-in admin browser.

items.title: Embedded pilot frame fills available container width
items.precondition: Admin is signed in and a contained pilot session is visible.
steps: 1. Open the organization Pilot tab with an active contained session.
2. Inspect the right edge of the pilot frame.
3. Confirm the client dashboard content uses the available frame width.
items.expected: The scaled iframe content reaches the right side of the pilot frame without leaving a large blank column and without adding a parent horizontal scrollbar.
items.evidence: Visual Chrome check: scaled iframe content filled the available pilot frame width, with no large blank right column and no parent horizontal overflow. Screenshot: plans/06272026-embedded-organization-pilot-tab/evidence/pilot-live-one-endo-kuda.png.
items.notes: Verified at Chrome zoom 90% in the signed-in admin browser.

items.title: Pilot frame copy is reduced and dashboard scale is increased
items.precondition: Admin is signed in and a contained pilot session is visible.
steps: 1. Open the organization Pilot tab.
2. Confirm the Pilot controls no longer show the removed helper sentence.
3. Start or view an active contained pilot session.
4. Confirm the iframe footer no longer shows the removed token note.
5. Inspect the embedded dashboard scale and frame overflow.
items.expected: The removed copy is absent, the embedded dashboard appears slightly larger than the previous 0.7 scale, and the parent frame still has no horizontal overflow.
items.evidence: Chrome UI/accessibility check: Pilot controls no longer showed "Start a contained client dashboard session..." copy, iframe footer no longer showed "This frame receives the pilot token..." copy, and the 0.75-scaled dashboard was visibly larger while remaining contained. Screenshot: plans/06272026-embedded-organization-pilot-tab/evidence/pilot-live-one-endo-kuda.png.
items.notes: Verified in the signed-in Chrome admin session on localhost:3000/admin.

items.title: Embedded frame header is removed and dashboard scale is increased again
items.precondition: Admin is signed in and a contained pilot session is visible.
steps: 1. Open the organization Pilot tab with an active contained session.
2. Confirm the embedded frame does not show the piloted-email header.
3. Confirm the embedded frame does not show the old contained-dashboard subtitle.
4. Confirm the embedded frame does not show the Live or Loading status pill.
5. Inspect the embedded dashboard scale and frame overflow.
items.expected: The embedded client dashboard starts directly below the Pilot controls, no frame header text or live/loading pill is visible, the iframe uses the increased 0.82 scale, and the parent frame still has no horizontal overflow.
items.evidence: Chrome visual check after reload at localhost:3000/admin/organizations/39?section=pilot&userId=60: the embedded frame header text and live indicator are absent, and the dashboard is larger while remaining contained. Screenshot: plans/06272026-embedded-organization-pilot-tab/evidence/pilot-rev5-scale-header-removed.png.
items.notes: Chrome blocks JavaScript from Apple Events on this machine, so this Rev 5 acceptance was verified by visible browser screenshot evidence.
